description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof, surrounded by a neatly trimmed green hedge. The front facade features large rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows, and a central entry door with glass panels. The house includes an outdoor swimming pool with a geometric shape and a small patio area with outdoor furniture. The rear and side facades have fewer windows, maintaining a clean and minimalist appearance. The interior is partially visible, showing open rooms and a staircase, with a spacious layout and contemporary design elements.
description: A modern two-story house with large symmetrical windows, a flat roof, and a surrounding hedge, featuring a pool and patio in front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, large symmetrical windows, the pool, patio, and surrounding hedge.
description_view_1: Side view with the pool on the left, fewer windows, and the hedge enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view with symmetrical windows and a clear view of the hedge, no visible entryway or pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal windows and a glimpse of the interior layout, hedge visible all around.
attribute_entryway_design: Central glass-paneled door with no steps or porch, minimalistic and flush with the facade
